ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shops" (
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the shop */,
  "shop_location" TEXT /* Location of the shop */,
  "is_shopee_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the shop is verified by Shopee */,
  "is_official_shop" INTEGER /* Indicates if the shop is an official store */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shop owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the shop */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the shop */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the shop's website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles for the shop */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the shop was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the shop was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shop_performance" (
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop */,
  "item_count" INTEGER /* Number of items listed by the shop */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the shop has */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Average response time for customer inquiries */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate for customer inquiries */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average value of orders */,
  "return_rate" REAL /* Rate of returns */,
  "refund_rate" REAL /* Rate of refunds */,
  "customer_satisfaction_score" REAL /* Customer satisfaction score */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shop_ratings" (
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop */,
  "rating_bad" INTEGER /* Number of bad ratings */,
  "rating_good" INTEGER /* Number of good ratings */,
  "rating_normal" INTEGER /* Number of normal ratings */,
  "rating_star" REAL /* Overall rating (out of 5) */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews */,
  "review_summary" TEXT /* Summary of reviews */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the ratings were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shop_join_date" (
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop */,
  "join_month" TEXT /* Month the shop joined */,
  "join_day" INTEGER /* Day the shop joined */,
  "join_year" INTEGER /* Year the shop joined */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the shop joined the platform */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the join date was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when data was collected */,
  "time_collected" TEXT /* Time when data was collected */,
  "collected_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data collected */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_logs_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, shop owner) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shop being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the shop */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the shop was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the shop data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shop_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the item */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the item was added to the shop */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the item's image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the item details were last updated */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shop_items_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shop_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop */,
  "follower_name" TEXT /* Name of the follower */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the follower started following the shop */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the follower */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the follower record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shop_followers_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shop_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the reviewer (out of 5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the reviewer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shop_reviews_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shop_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items sold */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shop_transactions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES shop_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shop_transactions_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id")
)
